# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Write a Helm chart that includes an Ingress resource for our application. Configure the ingress to accept traffic from any hostname for flexibility across different environments (dev, staging, prod). We'll configure TLS certificates later when we move to production.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1beta1
kind: Ingress
metadata:
  name: my-app-ingress
spec:
  tls: # TLS configuration for the ingress resource, if any are provided here they will be used to secure your application in production environment  
    - hosts:
        - dev.mydomain.com
      secretName: development-tls-certificate    
  rules:
    - host: "dev.mydomain.com" # This is the domain you're going to use for testing, it should be replaced by your actual application URL in production environment  
      http:
        paths:
          - pathType: ImplementationSpecific
            path: "/" 
            backend:   
              serviceName: my-app # This is the name of our Service which exposes this Ingress resource. It should be replaced by your actual application's Kubernetes Service Name  
                port:    
                  number: 80
